Featuring a vibrant 2.02-inch full AMOLED display with a resolution of 410×494 dpi, this smartwatch ensures you enjoy a crystal-clear view of your notifications and health metrics. Powered by the latest SF32LB525 chip, it boasts a dual-core architecture along with an integrated 3D graphics engine and AI neural network accelerator for seamless performance.

The HK10 Ultra 3 is equipped with essential sensors, including a pedometer, heart rate monitor, and G-sensor, allowing you to track your fitness and health metrics accurately. With Bluetooth 5.3 compatibility for both Android and iOS devices, you can connect effortlessly to the Wearfit Pro app, which enhances your smartwatch experience.

Measuring 49×44×12 mm and powered by a 260 mAh battery with magnetic wireless charging, this smartwatch is designed for convenience. It's life waterproof, making it suitable for handwashing and light rain, though not for swimming.

Take charge of your health with comprehensive monitoring features that include heart rate, blood pressure, blood oxygen tracking, respiratory rate, sleep analysis, and guided breathing exercises. Engage in various sports modes, track your steps, and utilize the real compass for outdoor adventures.

Additional features such as Bluetooth calls, weather updates, alarms, and multimedia controls for music playback and camera operation enhance the functionality of this remarkable smartwatch. Customize your settings with adjustable screen brightness, notification preferences, and a Do Not Disturb mode.

Important notes for first-time use include fully charging the watch before activation and downloading the Wearfit Pro app via the QR code in the manual for setup. Ensure you use the original charging cable and compatible power adapter for optimal performance. Designed for daily exposure to water, but avoid submersion or contact with corrosive liquids.

Included in the package are the HK10 Ultra 3 Smartwatch, a magnetic charging cable, user manual, and a retail box. Experience the perfect blend of style and technology with the HK10 Ultra 3 Smartwatch today!
